file_name: Questionnaire - Argo Bowen 2 – Bowen Coking Coal and certain subsidiaries - March 2026.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Argo Bowen 2, Bowen Group and/or their related entities.
